steps.title: Identify the relationship
steps.content: Cause: 2023 measurements showed concerning rotation. Effect: officials closed the area to study stabilization. The blank links cause to effect.

steps.title: Pick the transition
steps.content:
As a result signals consequence — a perfect match.

"In comparison" / "Similarly" suggest likeness; "For example" suggests instantiation. None convey the cause-effect link.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
